speaker: speaker2
text: Hey Tina . What are you doing ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I was just watching TV . What's going on with you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I just watched a movie and I'm scared .

speaker: speaker2
text: I saw the Sixth Sense . I didn't know it was going to be so scary .

speaker: speaker1
text: I remember that . It was a great movie . But it was definitely scary .

speaker: speaker2
text: If you're not busy , do you want to come over ? I'm afraid to be alone .

speaker: speaker1
text: Sure . I can come over . What should we do ?

speaker: speaker2
text: How about if we watch a comedy . I need something to get my mind off the frightening images I have from the Sixth Sense .

speaker: speaker1
text: Ok . I'll get ready and leave . I'll see you in about 20 minutes .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don't worry , nothings going to happen . I'll be there real soon .
